reviews.review_description: A relaxing and visually impressive VR journey with hypnotic environments and dreamlike visuals. Perfect for meditation and immersive psychedelic vibes.

Other than the medical use of this app that the developer explained in other reviews The idea of making a game to show you how LSD and drug users see the world without actually needing to do drugs is something that people should work on.
But as for this game you can't expect to get crazy graphics and an accurate experience of a drug user and the experience isn't really engaging BUT usually the most important part of work is the idea and this dev has it so I'm looking forward to more detailed, more deeper and engaging experience works of this dev in the future.

This app looks noting like the screenshots provided and instead looks like you had a trip back to the early 80's with cheesy  graphics and a rather boring repetitive landscape that you slowly drift across. Music was ok but it just loops around and repeats the same track but worst of all just like having a bad trip theres no way out of this nightmare with no way to exit other than having to do a forced restart on my Q3. Im not entirely sure what is meant by "early access" but so far this looks incredibly half baked and definitely not worth the $9 paid.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. The purpose of this app is to visualise, based on research, the kinds of visuals that people report experiencing under psychedelics such as mushrooms or LSD. It can also be a useful tool for addiction and drug counsellors as part of therapeutic sessions.

Regarding your concern about exiting the experience: you can press the Meta button and select Quit to leave the app. That said, in the next version, we will be adding a dedicated Exit button to make this process clearer and easier.

We appreciate your input it helps us improve and provide a better experience for everyone.

reviews.review_description: i suggest you look at reviews before buying games and let me explain why. i bought this a game just out of impulse and it turned out to be TRASH, the graphics are absolutely terrible...

developer_response.body: Dear User,  Thanks for suggesting the others to read the reviews, and i highly recommend reading the developer's answer. The purpose of this app is to visualise, based on research, the kinds of visuals that people report experiencing under psychedelics such as mushrooms or LSD. It can also be a useful tool for addiction and drug counsellors as part of therapeutic sessions.

reviews.review_description: Wow, what an amazing experience. Bravo

developer_response.body: We’re thrilled that you had such an amazing experience with our app.
